Rule.name: Ascension-Rule-GSuite-CWRNoMail-LicenseRevocation
Rule.Description: Leverages Google Workspace APIs (Directory API, and Enterprise License Manager API) to obtain Workspace Accounts in the /CWR/NoMail OU; and revokes any Workspace License assigned to them.

Argument.name: Total With License
Argument.Description: Total Accounts Holding a License at Runtime.

Argument.name: Total Without License
Argument.Description: Total Accounts Without a License at Runtime.

Argument.name: Total Failed Lookups [403 Forbidden]
Argument.Description: Total License Lookups Resulting in 403 Forbidden Response.

Argument.name: Total Refused Revocations [412 Precondition Failed]
Argument.Description: Total Attempted License Revocations Resulting in 412 Precondition Failed Response.
